title: Trident Is Easy
description: This resource pack makes the trident play like in Actions & Stuff.
body:
## What's this resource pack?
Many people are trying to create Actions & Stuff in Java, ~~but no one has made a trident.~~

![Fish!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e58ed1259eeb4b7fb54b1e235dd93c6dbd593fe1.png)
## Compatibility
Other models of the trident do not work with this resource pack.
## Dependencies
[Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hold-my-items)
